page_content:
Prerequisite: MUSC210 and MUSC130; or permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

Restriction: Junior standing or higher.

MUSC428 Repertoire Coaching of Vocal or Chamber Music (2 Credits)

A course for piano students who wish to go further than the work offered in MUSC128, MUSC228 and MUSC328 by becoming specialists in

the areas of vocal coaching or chamber music coaching. Elements of pedagogy, conducting and responsible artistic decision-making for the entire musical production.

Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in MUSC328.

MUSC436 Jazz: Then and Now (3 Credits) Major styles and influential artists of the past 75 years of jazz.

MUSC438 Area Studies in Ethnomusicology (3 Credits) Advanced study of musics in selected parts of the world. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.
